overview: NextFlow is an LLM workflow builder inspired by Krea.ai. Build visual AI pipelines by connecting nodes on a canvas — upload images and videos, apply processing steps, and chain multiple Gemini AI calls to generate complex content like marketing kits and product descriptions.
features: Visual React Flow canvas with drag-and-drop node creation, dot grid, pan/zoom, and minimap
Six node types: Text, Upload Image, Upload Video, Run LLM, Crop Image, and Extract Frame
Google Gemini API integration for multimodal LLM execution with pulsating glow effects
Frontend-only image cropping (canvas) and video frame extraction
Workflow execution with parallel branches, dependency resolution, and real-time node status
Execution history sidebar with 100-record capacity, status badges, and expandable node logs
Internet Identity authentication with user-scoped workflows and history
Workflow persistence, JSON export/import, and sample 'Product Marketing Kit Generator' workflow
Undo/redo, cycle detection, type-safe node connections, and DAG validation
